title: General Studies Paper III
syllabus: Technology, Economic Development, Biodiversity, Environment, Security and Disaster Management.

questions.text: Discuss the role of the MSME sector in employment generation and economic growth in India.
What are the applications of biotechnology in agriculture? Discuss with examples.
Examine the challenges of water management in India and suggest measures for sustainable use.
Analyze the internal security challenges posed by left-wing extremism in India.
Discuss the significance of the Production Linked Incentive (PLI) scheme for manufacturing in India.
Examine the impact of climate change on Indian agriculture and adaptation strategies.
Discuss the role of space technology in disaster management in India.
Discuss the objectives and challenges of the National Monetisation Pipeline.
Analyze the threats to cybersecurity in India and the institutional framework to address them.
Discuss the conservation strategies for biodiversity hotspots in India.
Explain the concept of inflation and its impact on the Indian economy.
Discuss the role of renewable energy in achieving India's climate commitments.
What is the significance of the National Education Policy for skill development and innovation?
Examine the border management challenges of India and measures to strengthen border security.
